programme.title: Facing Waves Ep304: Newfoundland Labrador
programme.desc: Quaint villages, dramatic coastlines and heart stopping encounters with whales by sea kayak–just a taste of what Newfoundland has to offer. There’s no better place to experience the magic of icebergs by sea kayak than the northern tip of Quirpon Island, the northernmost point of Newfoundland and Labrador.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep101 Sumbawa, Indonesia
programme.desc: Join World Champion surfers Mick Fanning, Stephanie Gilmore and Mark Occhilupo as they adventure through Indonesia’s Sumbawa area of Lakey Peak with surfers Bede Durbidge, Ozzie Wright and Mikala Jones. These world-class athletes surf perfect waves while relishing all that the Surfing Lifestyle has to offer.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep35: Exotic water adventures in Samoa
programme.desc: Exotic adventure and ocean sports come together as five world-class athletes explore Samoa's pristine reef breaks and uncharted waters at the world-famous Salani Surf Resort. Polynesian culture, a perfect waves and Mother Nature create an unforgettable trip.

programme.title: Blue World Ep710: Bahama’s Exuma Islands + Mexico's Reef Sharks
programme.desc: In the Bahama’s Exuma Islands, Blue World films world famous swimming pigs before exploring an underwater cave that vanishes under an island. Then we travel to the waters of Mexico to investigate reef sharks sleeping in caves…unknown to occur anywhere else in the world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep109: Aquabike World Championships
programme.desc: This Hot Water episode previews the world’s best jetski racers who will compete head-to-head for the prestigious UIM Aquabike World Championship title.

programme.title: 12 Dogs Drive
programme.desc: Facing incredible physical and emotional challenges, a musher and his dog sled team travel from Churchill Manitoba, three thousand kilometres through the wilderness to their new home in Saint John, New Brunswick Canada.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. The stakes are high in the Club de Campo de Madrid and the obstacles in the course get in the way of the riders to become the best team show jumping riders. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: The Dutch Masters 2021 Highlights
programme.desc: As the largest indoor show in the Netherlands, The Dutch Masters (Indoor Brabant Horse Show) has already stood for top-class equestrian sport for half a century. Together with the CHI Genève, CSIO Spruce Meadows Masters and the CHIO Aachen, the Dutch Masters is one of the four top events of the respected Rolex Grand Slam. The best riders in the world meet up every year in March in a bid to ride to victory in the legendary Brabanthallen. The first World Cup Final of showjumping was staged in this venue for the first time in 1994, and since prestigious competitions and more finals have taken place in one of the four pillars of showjumping and dressage. Intense competitions meet exquisite entertainment amid the unique atmosphere of the Dutch Masters. You can now watch the highlights of the competition on Horse TV.

programme.title: Dubai Polo Gold Cup - Final
programme.desc: The world's best polo teams meet at the Dubai Polo Gold Cup competition. After days of competition, UAE and AM are the two lasting teams who will dispute the most important Polo tournament in Asia and the Middle East. They will have to show a combination of equestrian pursuits, skills and team effort to win. Relive the 2020 final between UAE vs. AM.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Week 5
programme.desc: The fifth week of the Sunshine Tour 2020 is running short due to the COVID-19 pandemic, but the exciting past weeks of the competition are not over until the Suzuki Grand Prix is disputed. In the last day of the XXVI Sunshine Tour, both riders and horses enjoyed a wonderful competition, and the best riders have made it to the jumpoff. Enjoy the best moments of the fifth week of the Sunshine Tour, on HorseTV.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Discover the rich underwater life of the Red Sea with this virtual diving tour. Immerse yourself in the peaceful surroundings of colorful fish, coral reefs, and a sunken ship, all accompanied by calming music and natural underwater sounds for relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Explore the serene beauty of Croatia's coastline in stunning pictures, where peaceful music accompanies aerial views of crystal-clear waters and golden autumn landscapes. Let the calm ambiance and vibrant scenery transport you to this picturesque "Land of a Thousand Islands."

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Embark on a stunning visual journey over South Africa’s rugged coastline, captured in breathtaking drone footage. From steep cliffs to golden beaches and turquoise waters, the vibrant colors and soothing sounds of the ocean create a perfect atmosphere for relaxation and connection with nature.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mulsanne, Bentley's flagship car, provides luxury like in a first class hotel and elegance like an Armani suit. In addition: the Rolls-Royce Ghost. And: the high-tech coupe by Mercedes, the S 63 AMG with its V8 twin-turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4 combined the best elements that Porsche could offer. In addition: the Audi R8 V10 plus, an even stronger, lighter and faster version of the original model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's Vantage N430 model is a sports car that makes drivers and enthusiasts feel the heritage of British race cars. Also: a combination of elegance and power, the Bentley Continental GTC Speed with its W12 Twin Turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Do you want to feel like a racing driver without being limited to a race track? If so, the British manufacturer Radical is the right choice, as the company builds race cars with road approval. Their RXC is a powerful and agile racer.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: We meet UFC champions Tyron Woodley and Stephen Thompson, as well as Ukrainian boxer Lomachenko. Anthony Joshua's sponsorship deals make him a luxury sales rep and MMA is welcomed by the world of cinema.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the greatest champions of combat sports, notably the Mexican sensation Canelo Alvarez. Judo star Teddy Riner has lit up the streets of Paris, and F1 driver Daniel Ricciardo rubs shoulders with some sumotori greats.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the greatest champions of combat sports, in particular Andre Ward, still at the top even after a change of category, and the actress Gal Gadot, who prepared for her role as Wonder Woman through combat sports.

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: Manny Pacquiao has taken his defeat against Jeff Hom badly. MMA star Angela Lee returns strengthened, and a look back at the Hollywood career of Donnie Yen. Finally, Anthony Joshua competes against another British champion, but out of the ring!

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: They're big, they're audacious, they're the stars of combat - the best fighters in the ring as well as in their personal lives.

programme.title: Top 20
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: No player in the history of women's golf has experienced the trajectory of Inbee Park from 2012 onwards, with notably three consecutive victories in major tournaments.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: American gymnast Simone Biles faces up to the disappointments and dissimulations of Larry Nassar, and Tonya Harding harms her greatest rival in ice skating.

programme.title: Star Block Workout
programme.desc: In the 'Urban Fit Special Guests' series, travel from Paris to London, via Johannesburg, and meet "Boost" (@mrblockworkout). This 23-year-old former bad boy has created his own fitness training, exclusively using his body and the surrounding urban environment.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: At the 1936 Olympic Games, Jesse Owens recorded one of the greatest sporting performances in history. At LA 84, the collision between Zola Budd and Mary Decker become the topic of conversation of the Games.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Lewis Hamilton has been the dominant force in F1, winning four consecutive titles from 2017 to 2020 and has become the greatest victor in this sport.

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better
programme.desc: Czech freestyle motocross star Libor Podmol is proof that the wildest dreams come true. In January, 2010 he flies to the US, buys a Suzuki 250 two-stroke, becomes 6 times world champ and signs a sponsorship deal with Rockstar Energy.

programme.title: California Republic
programme.desc: No other place offers such endless freedom while fueling surfing's evolution. California's blue skies, green waters, and landscapes inspire millions worldwide and shape global culture.

programme.title: Peace and Left II
programme.desc: A Basque freesurfer documents a five-month journey through Indonesia, traveling with family, friends, and alone, capturing his surf adventure on camera.

programme.title: All Or Nothing
programme.desc: A self-supported project celebrating two-wheel sports, filmed across Europe, featuring young talents and world-class riders in MTB, trials, BMX, and motorsports.

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: Le Défi Azimut - Episode 1
programme.desc: One month before the Vendée Globe 2016, the best Imoca skippers were able to test their boat for the last time during the sixth edition of the Défi Azimut. Every year, this festive weekend provides an opportunity for all stakeholders in ocean sailing to see the Imoca 60 boats and to meet their skipper on the dock.

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 1 - Part One
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 2 - Part Two
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: The Crikvenica Riviera is one of the most scenic parts of the Adriatic coast with a rich diversity of attractive beaches, green hinterland, a continental wooden area, a climate that provides perfect refreshment in the summer time and just the right amount of action-packed fun in the sun. Find out more in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome, sailors! In this episode of Sail-ho Croatia we arrive to the incredibly beautiful, fragrant and action-packed island of Cres. The islands of Cres and Lošinj are connected to the ancient legend of Jason and the Argonauts in their search for the golden fleece aboard the Argo. Stick around to find out the best spots in these islands!

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Aboard the Eclipse

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Haunted Boat
programme.desc: HAUNTED BOAT is a mystical, mind-twisting psychological horror film about six teenagers going on a boat trip and getting lost in parallel dimensions where they have to face their greatest fears.

programme.title: Insidious Inferno
programme.desc: A secluded cottage is plagued by a series of gruesome murders, unbeknownst to the inhabitants something other worldly lurks within the halls.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E06 - ATV Accidents
programme.desc: Laura and Nick rig up some dramatic, high-speed tests of ATVs to see how accidents happen and what to do to protect from harm.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E07 - Treestand Accidents
programme.desc: Exploring why treestand accidents happen and how to prevent them.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E08 - Surviving Nature's Fury
programme.desc: Nick Mundt and Laura Schara experience Nature’s fury through storm amazing generating gear that simulates terrible hurricanes, ice cold winds and even tornados. For these experiments they’ll use remarkable technology that creates massive storms on Hollywood sets.

programme.title: Survival Science - S01:E04 - Surviving a Mountain Lion Attack
programme.desc: Laura and Nick break down the behaviors, strength, eyesight and speed of mountain lions through experiments and explore techniques to deal with these apex predators.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E01 - Best Moments Part 1
programme.desc: Brothers Chris and Casey Keefer look back on some of the best moments from the first two seasons of Dropped. They discuss their most unforgettable solo hunts and how the show has changed over time.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E02 - Best Moments Part 2
programme.desc: Brothers Chris and Casey Keefer look back on some of the best moments from the first two seasons of Dropped. They chat about behind-the-scenes stuff no one has seen and give a sneak peek into what's coming up in Season 3.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E03 - Dropped And Dragging
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer, two brothers, set off on another adventure in the wilds of Alaska. They're exploring a river system that hasn't been hunted in over ten years because of predators. The journey begins slowly, with the brothers spending more time dragging their gear than floating, in a place teeming with grizzlies.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E04 - Death In The Water
programme.desc: The search for a mature moose begins as brothers Chris and Casey Keefer move their way downriver, but when they cross paths with a giant sow grizzly, they get way more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E05 - Rising Waters
programme.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer keep heading downriver, and as the moose rut draws nearer, they have to rely more on catching fish, hunting ducks, and gathering berries. A massive Alaskan rainstorm hits, bringing big challenges for their success.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E01 - Rules of the Realm
programme.desc: Animals or groups protect their territory by using sounds like birds singing or scents like pheromones from many mammals to mark boundaries. These are just the initial warnings. If other animals ignore these signs, a conflict might happen. Animals need a secure territory to mate, raise their young, and ensure there's enough food and resources for survival. This episode looks at the strategies animals use to claim their territory.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E02 - Nature's World Wide Web
programme.desc: When animals share info to help each other decide, it's called animal communication. They use stuff like sounds, colors, body language, movements, electric signs, touches, smells, or a mix of these. Whether it's a sea anemone spreading its tentacles or a male lion considering approaching a mate, their skill in communicating can be vital for their success. This episode dives into how animals interact with one another.

programme.title: Junk Space Berlin
programme.desc: Welcome to the marginal deviation of reality. An inexplicable rift runs through the dystopian Berlin and four outsiders venture to find their friend.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Making Out
programme.desc: A screenwriter and self-proclaimed hopeless romantic meets a beautiful actress and they decide to act out their ideal love scenarios. When real feelings start to jump off the page and become real will he tell her how he feels? They're in love, probably.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The 2023 Gaels look to take back control of this decades-long battle. Legendary Coach Frank Tindall is one of the greatest of all time.

programme.title: We Are Golden

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.desc: A newspaper editor dosen't want his ex wife to remarry and he does everything in his powers to prevent it

programme.title: You Can Change The End
programme.desc: You might not be able to change your past, but you can change what happens next. When life feels stuck or uncertain, remember this: the result belongs to God, but your response is still in your hands. You don’t have to control the outcome, just move forward and trust Him with what comes next.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 1

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through

programme.title: Boundaries: It's Time To Stop Dancing With Dysfunction

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max seeks news about Rosa Blanco; Mother Isabel confesses to Father Tiziano that Camilla already knows her mother's name. Camila discovers Max in a kiss with Astrid. Families at war.

Convinced that Hilario needed to intimidate him to stop investigating his father's death, Nicolás accuses Guanipa of having shot Florencia; the police stop the argument. Victoria discovers Felipe and Clementina searching the letter Sergio wrote for her, which inflames her; Felipe convinces Victoria to trust him to help her find justice thanks to Sergio's confession: Fernanda Alcoy is behind the various murders. Once at the hospital, Florencia reveals all her secrets to Nicolás: the woman who shot her was Fernanda del Casal to prevent her from accusing her with the police for the death of Genara and Sergio; Florencia also assumes her responsibility for having provoked Victoria to have a fight with her and make believe that it was her fault that she lost her son, but Victoria restrained herself; Nicolás is surprised. The last secret that Florencia reveals is that the real murderer of Jaimito del Casal is Rosendo Zapata.

programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: NOTICIERO UNICANAL
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: NOTICIERO UNICANAL
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Hay química entre Camila y Max. Explosión en Mascarada. Max y Ezequiel a punto de enfrentarse por Camila. Ella siempre pensando que a su Mamá la envuelve un misterio.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Una nerviosa reunión entre Ezequiel y la Madre Isabel intriga a Camila. Max apoya a Camila en su trabajo y le ofrece ayudar en la búsqueda de su madre.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila quiere saber qué hace la Madre Isabel en casa de Elda y le dicen que es ayudar para el orfanato. Camila y Yeli están en la vereda donde la mamá de Camila la abandonó de 5 años asustada y llorosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En los pasillos se rumora que Max apadrina a Camila a cambio de sexo. Un disparo mantiene a Javier sin reacciones. Se enfrentan Camila y Marcelina, siempre por el asunto de su madre y luego Camila decide disculparse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La misteriosa mujer que nombra Marcelina es una incógnita para Camila y Max piensan que están más cerca de encontrarla. Continúa la guerra entre las familias López y Aragón. Max y Camila visitan el orfanato.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
